ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the product is suitable for */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage on the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing dimension */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the dimension belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the dimension belongs to */,
  "dimension_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing dimension (e.g., bust, waist, length) */,
  "dimension_value" REAL /* Value of the sizing dimension */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dimension (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dimension was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dimension was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_dimensions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_dimensions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger inventory replenishment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item is */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the item is */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
